mapper.select: { CALL ${schema}..USP_WEEKDLVY_SAVE ( #{saveGubn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tblLgstWeekdlvyMId ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cmpyCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zoneType ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zoneCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{weekdlvyYn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{monYn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tueYn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{wedYn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{thuYn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{friYn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{satYn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sunYn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{strtDt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{memo ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{saveUser ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) }
